title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Editorial Assistant Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Editorial Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Pharm and M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs...
